mainEntity.name: How does voice search optimization actually work for local businesses?

acceptedAnswer.text: The process usually starts with local listings, then moves to website content and structured data. A strong setup includes a complete profile, natural-language questions on your site, fast mobile pages, and reviews that reflect real customer experiences.
acceptedAnswer.description: It works by matching conversational questions to accurate business data, helpful FAQ content, and strong local signals. The best results usually come from listings, schema, reviews, and fast mobile pages.
